description: Service update: shared id rejection, the timeout range rejection (Python's text now matches Go's 'between 1 and 255'), confirm gate, and the PUT body once confirmed.

cases.name: rejects non-positive service_id
cases.expect_error: service_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: rejects an out-of-range timeout
cases.expect_error: timeout must be an integer between 1 and 255

cases.name: requires confirm before updating
cases.expect_error: This updates a Managed service monitor. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a Managed service monitor. Set confirm=true to proceed.
